element.hint: Width of the border stroke around each slice
element.label: Slice Stroke Width
element.name: stroke_width

element.hint: Color of the border between slices
element.label: Slice Stroke Color
element.name: stroke_color

element.hint: Rotation angle in degrees where the first slice begins
element.label: Start Angle (degrees)
element.name: start_angle

element.hint: Sort slices by value in descending order
element.label: Sort Slices by Value
element.name: sort_slices

element.hint: Gap between slices in radians (e.g., 0.02 for a subtle gap)
element.label: Pad Angle
element.name: pad_angle

element.hint: Display labels on or near each slice
element.label: Show Slice Labels
element.name: show_labels

element.hint: Format of labels displayed on pie slices
element.label: Labels - Format
element.name: label_format

element.hint: Inner radius as proportion or px - set > 0 for a donut chart
element.label: Inner Radius (donut)
element.name: inner_radius

element.hint: Color of the center label text
element.label: Center Label Color
element.name: center_label_color

element.hint: Text shown in the center of a donut chart
element.label: Center Label (donut)
element.name: center_label

element.hint: Font size of the center label in pixels
element.label: Center Label Font Size
element.name: center_label_font_size
